title: Butcher's Delight Foods
description: Adds more animal parts and foods for vanilla mobs
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/m0gMQ6C.png)


About the Mod
 

This is a mod that adds more animal parts, some parts have more saturation, others fill more hunger
has been created since some users of my other mod (Butcher's Delight) have requested the drop of these parts again
intended to be used alongside Butcher's Delight but can be used independently


Features and Mechanics 
 

Currently adds up to 3 animal parts for each animal
all animal parts can be cooked on a furnace, Smoker or campfire.

 ![All food](https://i.imgur.com/0arPkmC.png)

Animals included:

COW,
PIG,
Sheep,
Goat,
Llama,
Hoglin.
 

Butcher Villager trades raw and cooked animal parts

 
 ![trades](https://i.imgur.com/dFrIKHM.png)



 

if  Farmer's Delight is installed you can use cutting board to cut the pieces in a smaller parts (x2 vanilla)
